case_title: GATTONI, MICHAEL VS SAN MATEO COUNTY TRANSIT DISTRICT

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONED RECEIVED FROM DEFT.COPY SENT TO COMISSIONER.
CORRESPONDENCE OF DEF S ATTORNEY JOHN JONES RCVD AND FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GATTONI, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN MATEO COUNTY TRANSIT DISTRICT BOTH PARTIES FAILED TO MEET THEIR BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
